Bash(curl -s "https://api.render.com/v1/logs?resource=srv-d7a6qhnkijhs73di1ksg&ownerId=tea-d7a63r4hg0os73b9ttg0&limit=50&direction=backward&startTime=2026-04-07T03:04:00Z" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer rnd_n2kciY0Bny2LE1tRfwqNKroOT7v1" | python -c "
import json,sys
data=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for l in data['logs']:
    msg=l['message'].encode\('utf-8'\).decode\('unicode_escape'\) if '\\\\\\\\u' in repr\(l['message']\) else l['message']
    # strip ANSI
    import re
    msg=re.sub\(r'\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*[mK]|\\x1b\\\([A-Z]','',msg\)
    if msg.strip\(\):
        print\(msg\)
")
